title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory impacts their standing in the ACC Tournament and their chances for the NCAA tournament.

title: Virginia Secures Win Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Virginia defeats N.C. State for the third time this season, with Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder leading the scoring.
charlotte_impact: This win is crucial for Virginia's momentum in the ACC Tournament.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game determines which team advances further in the ACC Tournament.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack versus No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers ACC Tournament quarterfinal game in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights for sports fans and bettors interested in the game's outcome.

title: Two Fatalities in Head-On Collision in Lancaster
summary: Two drivers were killed in a head-on crash on Airport Road near Golf Course Road in Lancaster on Friday morning.
charlotte_impact: This tragic accident highlights the dangers of driving and the importance of road safety.

title: Two Seriously Injured in West Charlotte Shooting
summary: Two victims were found shot on Lucky Penny Street in west Charlotte on Friday afternoon and are seriously hurt.
charlotte_impact: This shooting raises concerns about public safety and gun violence in the area.

title: Sustain Charlotte Challenges I-77 South Alternatives
summary: Sustain Charlotte launches a public challenge regarding alternatives to the I-77 South project, which impacts greenways and parks.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community concerns about the environmental impact of infrastructure projects.

title: Government Shutdown Could Lengthen TSA Wait Times at Charlotte Airport
summary: A partial government shutdown may cause longer TSA wait times at Charlotte airport, advising passengers to arrive early.
charlotte_impact: Informs travelers about potential disruptions due to the government shutdown.

title: NC Allows Road Tests at Private Schools
summary: North Carolina adults can now take driver's license road tests at certified private schools to reduce wait times.
charlotte_impact: Improves convenience and reduces wait times for obtaining a driver's license.

title: Lancaster Police Search for Missing Teen
summary: Lancaster Police are seeking help to find a missing 15-year-old girl possibly taken by a non-custodial parent.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the vulnerability of missing children and the importance of community involvement.

title: Warm Weekend Forecast After Cold Start
summary: After a cold Friday, the weekend will bring warmer temperatures in the 70s before a cool down next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather information for planning weekend activities.

title: Man Charged in Hit-and-Run of 7-Year-Old
summary: Adarias Steffon Oliver charged with felony hit-and-run after striking a 7-year-old near a school bus stop in University City.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the serious consequences of reckless driving and endangering children.

title: Waxhaw Police Investigate Murder-Suicide
summary: Waxhaw police identify a couple found dead in an apparent murder-suicide, stating there is no danger to the public.
charlotte_impact: Deals with a tragic event and assures the community of their safety.

title: Reward Offered in Search for Missing 19-Year-Old
summary: Anson County authorities offer a reward for the safe return of a missing 19-year-old last seen in the Morven area.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the urgency of finding missing persons and encourages public assistance.

title: Man Killed in Head-On Crash in North Charlotte Identified
summary: CMPD identifies the man killed in a head-on crash on Statesville Road near Twin Lakes Parkway.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a fatal traffic accident and provides information about the victim.
